case_title: BRIAN LEE ET AL VS. 20 TH AVENUE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $72.50 SERVED FEB-19-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT 20 TH AVENUE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, BRIAN LEE, JEAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 20 TH AVENUE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $147.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,147.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 20 TH AVENUE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-21-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-21-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LEE, BRIAN LEE, JEAN AS TO DEFENDANT 20 TH AVENUE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
